exercises.code:
# agentic_I2 explorer-read · S11-T1-A-E1
from dataclasses import dataclass, field

@dataclass
class ClientRecord:
    client_id: str
    full_name: str
    phones: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)

print(ClientRecord("C001", "Ana Perez", ["999111222"]))

# agentic_I2 explorer-read · S11-T1-A-E2
from dataclasses import dataclass
from decimal import Decimal

@dataclass
class Transaction:
    tx_id: str
    client_id: str
    amount: Decimal
    currency: str

print(Transaction("T1", "C001", Decimal("150.50"), "PEN"))

exercises.code:
# agentic_I2 explorer-read · S11-T2-B-E1
from dataclasses import dataclass, field

@dataclass(frozen=True)
class ResolvedEntity:
    entity_id: str
    display_name: str = field(compare=False)

    def __post_init__(self):
        if not self.entity_id.strip():
            raise ValueError("entity_id vacío")

a = ResolvedEntity("E1", "Ana")
b = ResolvedEntity("E1", "Ana actualizada")
c = ResolvedEntity("E2", "Ana")
print(a == b, a == c)
print(len({a, b, c}))

exercises.code:
# agentic_I2 explorer-read · S11-T3-A-E2
from dataclasses import dataclass, field

@dataclass
class CaseFile:
    case_id: str
    evidences: list = field(default_factory=list)

    def add_evidence(self, ev: dict) -> None:
        self.evidences.append(ev)

cf = CaseFile("CF1")
cf.add_evidence({"score": 0.1})
cf.add_evidence({"score": 0.2})
print("valor=", len(cf.evidences))

selfcheck.chosen_text: Evita el default mutable compartido entre instancias
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Explorer S11 Q0: leí la teoría del quiz_card («{"subtopicId": "S11-T1-A", "heading": "Clases, instancias y dataclass", "paragraphs": ["Una **clase** define el molde; u…») y la pregunta «¿Por qué `field(default_factory=list)` y no `= []`?». La opción [2] «Evita el default mutable compartido entre instancias» es la que alinea con el outcome/iDo del paquete; las demás contradicen el material enseñado (venv/aislar, tipos, contratos, etc. según la sección).

selfcheck.chosen_text: Una señal/dato numérico, no un veredicto de fraude o familia
